## Summary

- 

## Backend scope

- [ ] API route or controller
- [ ] Service, DTO, validation, or shared contract
- [ ] Indexer, ledger event sync, or transaction simulation
- [ ] Prisma schema, database migration, or seed data
- [ ] Configuration, environment variables, or deployment
- [ ] Documentation, tests, or contributor experience only

## Validation

- [ ] `cd veilend-backend && npm run test`
- [ ] `cd veilend-backend && npm run test:e2e`
- [ ] `cd veilend-backend && npm run test:cov`
- [ ] Manual API or integration check documented below
- [ ] Not applicable because this is a documentation-only change

Validation notes:

-

## Documentation

- [ ] Updated README, API notes, or `.env.example` when behavior or configuration changed
- [ ] Added issue context, screenshots, or request/response examples when useful
- [ ] No documentation update needed

## Security and data handling

- [ ] No secrets, private keys, wallet signatures, tokens, or personal data are committed
- [ ] Authentication, authorization, wallet-signature, or financial-data changes are clearly described
- [ ] Migration, rollback, and deployment impact are documented when relevant

## Review checklist

- [ ] Linked the related issue
- [ ] Kept the change focused and reviewer-friendly
- [ ] Called out follow-up work or known limitations
